summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 3 UX fixes for Location Alarm PWA. All fixes verified working: (1) onFocus scroll handler on search inputs, (2) geocode API with GPS bias + TripForm using data.results array, (3) reverse-geocode endpoint + map click auto-opens alarm drawer with pre-filled address. Backend: 100% pass (14/14 tests). Frontend: 100% pass on all tested flows.

console_warnings.issue: Missing DialogContent Description warning - non-blocking accessibility warning
HTML hydration warning: span cannot be child of select/option - related to dev instrumentation, not production issue

passed_tests: Issue 1 - Keyboard scroll fix: onFocus handler scrolls search input into view on AlarmForm
Issue 1 - Keyboard scroll fix: onFocus handler scrolls search input into view on TripForm waypoint inputs
Issue 2 - Geocode with GPS bias: GET /api/geocode?q=Koramangala&lat=12.97&lon=77.59 returns 5 results with Bangalore-area locations
Issue 2 - Geocode without GPS: GET /api/geocode?q=Mumbai returns Mumbai city result
Issue 2 - TripForm search: Uses data.results array correctly (searched 'Mumbai' and 'Chennai' successfully)
Issue 3 - Reverse geocode: GET /api/reverse-geocode?lat=12.9716&lon=77.5946 returns success with display_name
Issue 3 - Map click: Clicking on map auto-opens Add Alarm drawer with coordinates
Issue 3 - Map click: Reverse geocode fills search input with address (e.g., 'JJ Colony, Patel Nagar, West Delhi')
Issue 3 - Map click: Alarm name auto-filled from address
AlarmForm: Search returns multiple results dropdown
AlarmForm: Clicking search result populates coordinates and name
AlarmForm: Create alarm from search selection works
TripForm: Search shows results dropdown with GPS-biased results
TripForm: Selecting result fills coordinates and waypoint name
Bottom nav - Trips button opens My Trips drawer
Bottom nav - Alarms button opens Alarm List drawer
Bottom nav - + button opens Add Alarm drawer
Bottom nav - History button opens Alarm History drawer
Tab switching: Single Alarm and Plan Trip tabs work correctly
Mobile viewport (390x844): All forms render correctly
seed_data_creation: Created test alarms via map click and form submission during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 reported UX issues have been fixed and verified: (1) Search inputs have onFocus scroll handlers, (2) /api/geocode accepts lat/lon for GPS-biased results and TripForm correctly uses response.data.results, (3) /api/reverse-geocode works and map click auto-opens alarm drawer with pre-filled address. Console warnings about DialogContent Description and HTML hydration are non-blocking dev-mode warnings.
